attributes.description: Alerts when `envoy.server.live` drops below 1 — the admin `/ready` endpoint reports the proxy as not live.
attributes.name: [Envoy OTel] Server not live

investigation_guide.blob:
## Envoy server not live

### What fired
`envoy.server.live` was below 1 during the window.

### Why it matters
An Envoy that is not live is either in initialization, draining, or has entered the overload/failstate. Clients will get connection failures.

### Triage
1. Check the admin `/server_info` and `/ready` endpoints.
2. Cross-reference with `envoy.server.state` to see the exact lifecycle stage.
3. Review Envoy logs for overload manager trips or init failures.

### Remediation
- Restore control plane / config source so init can complete.
- Cancel drains if they were unintentional.

### Tuning
- Fires on any non-live sample; consider an alertDelay if restarts are frequent in your environment.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.live IS NOT NULL
// Server live is 1 when healthy, 0 when not
| STATS max_live = MAX(envoy.server.live)
| WHERE max_live < 1
